request_payload.exposure_text: 🚨 Strategic autonomy isn't just about us—it's about outsmarting our adversaries. As a former NATO cybersecurity advisor, I've seen firsthand how our reliance on foreign tech leaves us vulnerable. The recent cyberattacks on our critical infrastructure prove we need to invest in homegrown solutions. Don't let short-term costs blind us to long-term security. #NationalSecurityFirst
